metadata.description: Agent-side companion to the tauri-postgres-agent-harness: subagents, commands, and the vertical-slice skill for Tauri 2 + Hono + Postgres FORCE-RLS monorepos shipped as signed Windows executables.

plugins.name: tauri-postgres-agent-harness
